name: Sewwa AI Brief Generator
description: Turn one keyword into a full SEO content brief — titles, meta description, search intent, H1/H2/H3 outline, LSI keywords, tone, and target audience. Bilingual (English & Indonesian) and ready to hand to writers.

name: Sewwa Schema Generator
description: Create JSON-LD structured data for your website. Choose a schema type, fill in the form, and copy the generated code to your site.

name: Sewwa Color Palette
description: Create beautiful color palettes instantly. Convert colors between HEX, RGB, HSL formats and export to CSS variables ready for your projects.
